generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former intelligence analyst, I've seen firsthand how vital our alliances are for national security. While some question the burden-sharing, the truth is our partners bring unique intelligence capabilities that directly protect our civil liberties at home. In this uncertain world, weakening these ties isn't just strategic folly - it's a gift to those who'd do us harm. We can't afford to gamble with our safety over budget debates. #NationalSecurityFirst
